LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT LEGAL AID SOCIETY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 25, 2015 TO GIVE MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MARCH 4, 2015 AT 4:00 P.M. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE : ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS LEAVE TO ALLEGE ULTIMATE FACTS IN GOOD FAITH: (1) SHOWING LEGAL MALPRACTICE; (2) HOW THE ACTION IS NOT TIME BARRED; AND (3) SPECIFIC FACTS TO SUPPORT THE MISREPRESENTATION CLAIMS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR #7489; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS LEGAL AID SOCIETY AND BILL MCNEILL'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT, DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE SOLE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR LEGAL MALPRACTICE IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COMPLAINT AND MATTERS FOR WHICH THE COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE SHOW THAT AS A MATTER OF LAW THE LEGAL MALPRACTICE CLAIM IS TIME-BARRED PER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 340.6. ORDER SIGNED. LAW AND MOTION 302: PLAINTIFF OSCAR HOLLIN'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF PRIOR ORDER SUSTAINING DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND - ON RECONSIDERATION, THE COURT IS SUSTAINING THE DEMURRER WITH 20-DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF MR. HOLLIN CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH FILE A 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT ALLEGING THAT HIS CLAIM FOR LEGAL MALPRACTICE IS NOT BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS BECAUSE OF THE TOLLING PROVISION 340.6 SUB DIVISION A(2). THE COURT WILL PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-22-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2016 Continued To Jun-22-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Mtn For Reconsideration Of Prior Order
Off Calendar Apr-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Plaintiff Oscar Hollin telephone number 510-575-4329 in Propria Persona.
Kyle Montes de Oca of Roeca Haas Hager LLP telephone number 415-352-0980 for Defendants Legal Aid Society and Bill McNeill.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court vacated its tentative ruling. In re: PLAINTIFF OSCAR HOLLIN'S Motion For Reconsideration Of Prior Order sustaining defendants' demurrer to the third amended complaint without leave to amend - On reconsideration, the Court is sustaining the demurrer with 20-days leave to amend if Mr. Hollin can do so in good faith file a 4th amended complaint alleging that his claim for legal malpractice is not barred by the statute of limitations because of the tolling provision 340.6 sub division a(2). The Court will prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Matter called, no appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANTS LEGAL AID SOCIETY AND BILL MCNEILL'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT, Defendants' demurrer to the sole cause of action for legal malpractice is sustained without leave to amend. The complaint and matters for which the court takes judicial notice show that as a matter of law the legal malpractice claim is time-barred per Code of Civil Procedure 340.6. ORDER SIGNED.

Matter re-called, Plaintiff OSCAR HOLLIN, JR. (Tel No. 510-575-4329) now present, appearing in pro per. No other appearances made in this matter. The Court finds Plaintiff did not notify the opposing side of his intent to appear today to contest the Court's tentative ruling. The Court informs Mr. Hollin of the Court's order, and invites Mr. Hollin to file a motion for reconsideration of the Court's order (which need not present new facts/arguments). Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Continued To Apr-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - OSCAR HOLLIN JR., TEL. NO. 1-510-575-4329, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. SARAH L. FABIAN OF THE CALVO FISHER & JACOB LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-374-8370 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS LEGAL AID SOCIETY and BILL MCNEILL'S special and General DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with sixty days leave to amend. Plaintiff's statement that he incorrectly typed "April 2013" when he meant to type "April 2014" is credited, particularly given the apparent undisputed fact that he didn't file the underlying lawsuit until after April 2013. Correcting this typo defeats defendants' statute of limitations argument. However, defendants are correct that plaintiff has not adequately alleged causation and damages. Plaintiff will be given one last opportunity to do so. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/hk

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Continued To Jan-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2015 Continued To Jun-24-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiff OSCAR HOLLIN, Tel No. (510) 575-4329 appearing in pro per;
Atty. WILLIAM N. HEBERT of Calvo Fisher & Jacob LLP, Tel No. (415) 374-8390 appearing for Defendants Legal Aid Society and Bill McNeill.

RULING - Matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS LEGAL AID SOCIETY AND BILL MCNEILL'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 20 days leave to amend. Plaintiff has leave to allege ultimate facts in good faith: (1) showing legal malpractice; (2) how the action is not time barred; and (3) specific facts to support the misrepresentation claims. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT LEGAL AID SOCIETY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to March 25, 2015 to give moving and opposing parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 4, 2015 at 4:00 p.m. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the reply papers. Judge : Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302./ehg
